description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal can with a faded blue label, prominently featuring the Heinz Baked Beans branding. The can's surface is marred by scratches, scuffs, and areas of discoloration, suggesting it has been discarded and exposed to the elements for some time. The label is partially peeled and worn, with some text and graphics still visible, including a barcode and nutritional information. The top of the can is sealed, with a dark, slightly dented metallic lid that shows signs of rust and grime. The overall appearance is grimy and neglected, with the can's edges and corners showing the most wear. The object is lightweight and hollow, typical of an empty food can, and would be commonly found as litter in urban environments.
description: A battered, blue-labeled Heinz Baked Beans can with visible wear, rust, and faded branding. The can is dented, dirty, and clearly discarded.
description_view_0: This view shows the back of the can with a partially visible barcode, faded label text, and significant surface wear.
description_view_1: The main label with the Heinz Baked Beans branding is visible, though the text is faded and the surface is scratched.
description_view_2: This side view displays more of the label's nutritional information, with heavy wear and less branding visible.
description_view_3: The front of the can features the most prominent Heinz Baked Beans logo and product name, with visible grime and a yellow price sticker.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular Heinz logo with white text on a black background, partially visible on the front and back of the can.
attribute_label_text: HEINZ BAKED BEANS 1869 in tomato sauce 57 varieties
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label, partially visible.
attribute_rust_or_damage_marks: Visible rust, scratches, and dents on the lid and around the can's edges; label is heavily worn and dirty.
